title: The Day They Robbed the Bank of England
writer: John Brophy, Howard Clewes, Richard Maibaum
actors: Aldo Ray, Elizabeth Sellars, Peter O'Toole
plot: In 1901, a group of IRA members decides to rob the Bank of England in order to finance their movement and to embarrass the British government.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
